description: Rocket.Chat is open at the login screen. Log in with Username: admin and Password: Admin1234!. The IT infrastructure team has just completed an integration with a corporate Active Directory. To ensure user data remains consistent between the directory and Rocket.Chat, the "Source of Truth" must be the directory. Disable the following local profile editing capabilities: Allow Real Name Change, Allow Username Change, Allow Email Change, Allow User Avatar Change, and Allow Delete Own Account.
